attributes.title: [Traefik OTel] TLS & Config
attributes.description: TLS certificate expiry, TLS traffic distribution, and configuration reload health.

params.markdown:
## [Traefik OTel] TLS & Config

This dashboard monitors TLS and configuration health:
- TLS certificate expiry (certificates expiring soon)
- TLS traffic by version and cipher
- Configuration reload success and failure tracking
- TLS request volume over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_tls_certs_not_after IS NOT NULL
| EVAL now_epoch = TO_DOUBLE(NOW()) / 1000
| EVAL days_until_expiry = (traefik_tls_certs_not_after - now_epoch) / 86400
| WHERE days_until_expiry <= 30
| STATS certs_near_expiry = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_tls_certs_not_after IS NOT NULL
| EVAL now_epoch = TO_DOUBLE(NOW()) / 1000
| EVAL days_until_expiry = (traefik_tls_certs_not_after - now_epoch) / 86400
| WHERE days_until_expiry <= 30
| STATS certs_near_expiry = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL tls_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP tls_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
| EVAL duration_sec = DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts)
| EVAL tls_rate = CASE(duration_sec > 0, total / duration_sec, 0.0)
| KEEP tls_rate

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_config_reloads_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS reloads = MAX(traefik_config_reloads_total)

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_config_reloads_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS reloads = MAX(traefik_config_reloads_total)

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_config_last_reload_success IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_success = MAX(traefik_config_last_reload_success)
| EVAL now_sec = TO_DOUBLE(NOW()) / 1000
| EVAL age_seconds = now_sec - last_success

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_config_last_reload_success IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_success = MAX(traefik_config_last_reload_success)
| EVAL now_sec = TO_DOUBLE(NOW()) / 1000
| EVAL age_seconds = now_sec - last_success

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.tls_version
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL tls_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, attributes.tls_version, tls_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.tls_version
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL tls_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, attributes.tls_version, tls_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS tls_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total) BY attributes.tls_version
| SORT tls_requests DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS tls_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total) BY attributes.tls_version
| SORT tls_requests DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_tls_certs_not_after IS NOT NULL
| EVAL now_epoch = TO_DOUBLE(NOW()) / 1000
| EVAL days_remaining = (traefik_tls_certs_not_after - now_epoch) / 86400
| STATS days_remaining = AVG(days_remaining) BY attributes.cn, attributes.serial
| SORT days_remaining ASC
| LIMIT 50

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_tls_certs_not_after IS NOT NULL
| EVAL now_epoch = TO_DOUBLE(NOW()) / 1000
| EVAL days_remaining = (traefik_tls_certs_not_after - now_epoch) / 86400
| STATS days_remaining = AVG(days_remaining) BY attributes.cn, attributes.serial
| SORT days_remaining ASC
| LIMIT 50

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_config_reloads_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_config_reloads_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL reload_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, reload_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_config_reloads_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(traefik_config_reloads_total), min_ts = MIN(@timestamp), max_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_secs = GREATEST(DATE_DIFF("seconds", min_ts, max_ts), 1)
| EVAL reload_rate = total / bucket_secs
| KEEP time_bucket, reload_rate
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS tls_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total) BY attributes.tls_cipher
| SORT tls_requests DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "traefik.otel"
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS tls_requests = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_tls_total) BY attributes.tls_cipher
| SORT tls_requests DESC
| LIMIT 10
